name: @gotong/example-tea-chain-hq
description: 连锁奶茶店总部 → 门店 (跨组织指令下发) — an ORGANIZATION hub template whose workflow rolls a directive (e.g. a price change) DOWN to a franchise SHOP on another hub through the outbound approval gate (区域经理 approves before the chain-wide directive leaves HQ). Mirror of tea-supply-link, opposite tier. The cross-org LINK is runtime peer config, NOT in the template. Deterministic, no API key.
